name: Auto Research rebrand and cross-platform rewrite
acceptance_tests: Public docs and metadata use the Auto Research brand and point at Maleick/AutoResearch
Codex plugin package installs from the repo marketplace and mirrors the root skill bundle
Distribution validation and compatibility log tests pass
notes: Implementation is complete. Keep current web URLs live for the first rewrite. Maintain legacy autoresearch identifiers where compatibility matters.

name: Convert Auto Research to OpenCode-only npm package
acceptance_tests: npm pack --dry-run includes dist/, commands/, skills/, hooks/, docs/, .opencode-plugin/
package.json declares opencode-autoresearch with bin: autoresearch
No Python runtime files in shipped package
No Claude/Codex plugin bundles in shipped package
notes: Converting from Python/Codex/Claude hybrid to OpenCode-first npm package. Preserving loop semantics and mode workflows.
